executives.name: Marcelo Bastos
executives.background: Marcelo Bastos was appointed to the Board in February 2019. He is an experienced resources executive with over 30 years’ experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at BHP, Vale and MMG.

executives.name: Peter Wasow
executives.background: Peter Wasow has over 30 years' experience in the resources and energy sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and CEO of Alumina Limited and held senior executive roles at Santos Limited and BHP. He has extensive experience in financial management, strategy, and corporate governance.
